headline: SOSMA Detentions Without Trial Hit Record 480 in 2025
context: Home Ministry confirmed 480 individuals detained under SOSMA in 2025 highest since its 2012 enactment.

cards.big: 480 detained under SOSMA in 2025 the highest since 2012 enactment
cards.sub: Critics say law enables indefinite detention without adequate judicial review

cards.big: Average detention lasted 18 months before either charge or release in 2025
cards.sub: Detainees denied bail with limited legal counsel access during initial 28 days

cards.big: Only 38% of SOSMA detainees eventually charged in court since 2020
cards.sub: Remaining 62% released without charge after months of detention

cards.big: Bar Council documented 45 cases of alleged mistreatment during detention
cards.sub: SUHAKAM called for independent monitoring access to SOSMA facilities

cards.big: SOSMA usage tests whether security detention has sufficient safeguards against abuse
480 SOSMA detentions without trial in 2025. Preventive detention must have judicial review or it becomes abuse.
